note: Australian-produced. Grounded in the course's own modules. Founder to review before wiring live.

quizzes.title: CARSI Water Restoration Practitioner — Knowledge Check

options: A sanitary source such as a broken supply line

questions.questionText: Category 3 water is best described as…
options: Grossly contaminated water that may contain pathogens (e.g. sewage)

questions.questionText: The 'Class' of a water loss describes…
options: The amount of wet material and the resulting evaporation load

questions.questionText: Category 1 water left untreated in a warm building will…
options: Degrade toward Category 2 or 3 over time

questions.questionText: PPE for a water job is selected primarily by…
options: The hazard class of the water and site (e.g. Cat 3 needs more)

questions.questionText: A defensible dry standard is set by…
options: Guessing when the floor feels dry
Taking moisture readings from unaffected reference materials of the same type
